resposta:
solution:
```
class Solution:
    def maximumEvenSplit(self, finalSum: int) -> List[int]:
        if finalSum % 2 != 0:
            return []
        res = []
        i = 2
        while finalSum > 0:
            if finalSum - i >= i:
                res.append(i)
                finalSum -= i
                i += 2
            else:
                res.append(finalSum)
                break
        return res
```
efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(sqrt(finalSum))
space complexity: O(finalSum)
energy implications: LOW
explanation: The solution iterates through even numbers starting from 2, subtracting each number from the finalSum until it's no longer possible. This approach ensures the maximum number of unique positive even integers are used to sum up to finalSum.
